understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile. A level is won when each goal tile is simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is grid-based with 3 pixels per cell. MOVE actions shift the currently selected piece in a direction. Pushable objects adjacent in the movement direction may be pushed along with the piece. Walls block movement but behavior may vary. CLICK action with a target_position switches control to another selectable piece at that pixel coordinate. The semantic_grid maps P=selected piece, S=other selectable, B=block, #=wall, +=goal, .=empty.
